arguments.content:
# Sprint 10 Stakeholder Sync — Meeting Agenda

**Meeting:** Sprint 10 Stakeholder Synchronization  
**Date:** April 24, 2026  
**Time:** 10:00 AM CST (UTC+08:00)  
**Duration:** 60 minutes  
**Location:** Conference Room A / Zoom

---

## Attendees

| Role | Name |
|------|------|
| Tech Lead | Alex Zhang |
| Backend Engineer | Bai |
| Frontend Engineer | Chen |
| QA Engineer | Dana |
| Product Manager | (Stakeholder) |
| Engineering Manager | (Stakeholder) |

---

## Agenda Items

### 1. Sprint 10 Summary & Demo (15 min)
**Presenter:** Alex Zhang
- Showcase completed Sprint 10 deliverables
- Live demo of stakeholder dashboard UI
- Review sprint metrics (26 points completed)

**Expected Outcome:** Stakeholders confirm acceptance of Sprint 10 scope and demo quality.

---

### 2. Risk Register Review (15 min)
**Presenter:** Alex Zhang
- Update on API rate limiting implementation (R-01)
- New risks: Deployment complexity (R-03) and performance under load (R-04)
- Mitigation strategies for high-severity items

**Expected Outcome:** Agreement on risk mitigation plan and resource allocation for critical items.

---

### 3. Sprint 11 Planning Preview (15 min)
**Presenter:** Product Manager
- Proposed Sprint 11 goals and priorities
- Key deliverables and dependencies
- Resource availability and capacity planning

**Expected Outcome:** Stakeholder sign-off on Sprint 11 scope and priority ranking.

---

### 4. Technical Debt & Process Improvements (15 min)
**Presenter:** Chen & Bai
- Third-party SDK compatibility status (R-02)
- Integration testing coverage improvements
- Deployment pipeline optimization proposals

**Expected Outcome:** Approval for 2-3 technical debt items to be included in Sprint 11 backlog.

---

## Pre-Reading Materials

- [Sprint 10 Backlog](./20260423_sprint_10_backlog.json)
- [Risk Register](./risk_register.json)
- [Milestone Tracker](./milestone_tracker.json)

---

## Action Items (Post-Meeting)

- [ ] Alex Zhang to distribute meeting notes within 24 hours
- [ ] Bai to update deployment runbook before April 25
- [ ] Dana to finalize load testing plan for stakeholder demo environment
- [ ] Chen to submit technical debt prioritization proposal

---

*Agenda prepared by: Alex Zhang*  
*Prepared at: 2026-04-23T15:41:00+08:00*
